title: Deploy: ridgeline-queue v2.5.1 to prod
text: Deployment of ridgeline-queue v2.5.1 completed successfully on rcl-queue-01 and rcl-queue-02. No rollback required.

title: Alert: ridgeline-pipeline failed jobs spike
text: Pipeline job failure count reached 14 over 5 min. Traced to malformed payload from customer org rcl-org-0042. Fixed via schema validation patch.

title: rcl-worker-02 host went offline
text: rcl-worker-02 stopped reporting to Datadog agent at 2026-12-09T06:42:00Z. Cause: OOM kill on pipeline worker process. Host restarted, worker not yet re-enabled.

title: Deploy: ridgeline-compute v3.1.0 to prod
text: Canary deployment of ridgeline-compute v3.1.0 successful. Full rollout to rcl-compute-01 and rcl-compute-02 complete.

title: Maintenance: Postgres vacuum on rcl-db-01
text: Scheduled VACUUM ANALYZE on ridgeline prod database completed in 42 minutes. Table bloat reduced by ~18%.

title: Redis cache flush: ridgeline-cache-01
text: Manual cache flush triggered by ahayes@ridgelinecloud.io following bad token invalidation batch. Clients experienced cold-cache latency for ~3 min.

title: Deploy: ridgeline-api v4.2.3 to prod
text: ridgeline-api v4.2.3 deployed. Includes fix for pgx context propagation bug causing pool exhaustion under high concurrency.

title: Cloudflare DDoS mitigation triggered
text: Cloudflare WAF rate-limiting activated for ridgelinecloud.io. ~4200 blocked requests from 3 ASNs. Normal traffic unaffected. No origin-level impact.

title: Scheduled: weekly dependency audit
text: Automated go.sum + Dependabot scan completed. 2 low-severity advisories in indirect deps. Tracked in Linear issue RCL-441.

title: Deploy: ridgeline-scheduler v1.8.0 to prod
text: ridgeline-scheduler v1.8.0 live. Adds jitter to job retry intervals to reduce thundering herd under high-failure conditions.

title: Deploy: ridgeline-auth v2.3.1 to prod
text: ridgeline-auth v2.3.1 deployed. Implements 24-hour JWT key overlap window for safe key rotation. No auth disruption observed.

title: Alert: ridgeline-api p99 latency spike - resolved
text: ridgeline-api p99 latency hit 620ms at 2026-11-10T14:22Z. Root cause: elevated rcl-db-01 query time during stats computation. Resolved by query plan cache invalidation.

title: Maintenance: Kubernetes node drain rcl-compute-01
text: Scheduled drain of rcl-compute-01 for kernel patch. Workloads migrated to rcl-compute-02 and rcl-compute-03. Node back online after 18 minutes.

title: Deploy: ridgeline-queue v2.5.0 to prod
text: ridgeline-queue v2.5.0 canary deployment. New consumer group rebalance logic. Monitoring for rebalance storm before full rollout.

title: Alert: rcl-db-01 connection pool < 5 - resolved
text: rcl-db-01 pgx pool fell to 3 available connections during a traffic spike at 2026-10-28T09:15Z. ridgeline-api temporarily throttled. Pool expanded from 20 to 30 max connections.

title: Deploy: ridgeline-api v4.2.2 to prod
text: ridgeline-api v4.2.2 deployed. Adds structured zerolog logging and Datadog APM trace ID injection per ADR-003.

title: Scheduled: Postgres failover drill rcl-db-01 to rcl-db-02
text: Planned failover drill from rcl-db-01 to rcl-db-02 completed. Failover took 8 seconds. ridgeline-api retried and reconnected automatically. Postmortem notes added to Confluence.

title: Deploy: ridgeline-compute v3.0.2 to prod
text: ridgeline-compute v3.0.2 hot patch. Fixes goroutine leak in job dispatch loop under repeated scheduling errors.

title: Alert: ridgeline-scheduler heartbeat missed - resolved
text: ridgeline-scheduler failed to emit heartbeat for 12 minutes on 2026-03-22. Root cause: deadlock in job state transition. Resolved by process restart. Fix tracked in RCL-398.

title: Maintenance: Redis upgrade rcl-cache-01/02 to 7.2
text: Redis upgraded from 7.0 to 7.2 on both cache nodes. Zero-downtime rolling upgrade via cache-02 first. New LMPOP commands available for future consumer use.
